summary: GridFS storage migration testing completed. All 16 backend API tests passed verifying file upload, download, preview, shared access, ZIP export, and deletion via GridFS. Frontend accessible with working registration and login flow.

backend: File upload stores in GridFS with correct size
File download retrieves from GridFS with verified content hash
File preview returns correct content from GridFS
Shared file access works without authentication
Shared PDF export works without authentication
ZIP export includes files from GridFS
File deletion removes from GridFS (verified 404 on access)
PDF upload and preview works correctly
Large file (1MB) upload and download verified
Special characters in filename handled correctly
Dossier deletion cleans up all files
frontend: Registration form with all fields (name, email, password, confirm password)
Registration successful with redirect to dashboard
Dashboard shows user stats (Plan Free, dossiers count, pieces count)
Protected routes redirect to login when unauthenticated

seed_data_creation: Test files created and cleaned up during pytest execution
context_for_next_testing_agent: GridFS migration is complete and verified. All file operations (upload, download, preview, share, export, delete) work correctly with MongoDB GridFS storage. Health endpoint confirms storage_backend=gridfs. Previous bug fixes from iteration_4 remain valid. AI analysis is MOCKED due to budget exhaustion on EMERGENT_LLM_KEY.

mocked_apis.ai_analysis: MOCKED - Gemini AI analysis not working due to budget exhaustion on EMERGENT_LLM_KEY
